data.content:
Plan review rejected: no implementation plan was saved during planning. The notes array is empty — the planning step must document the plan in knot notes.

Expected plan content for this knot:
1. Add clap_complete as a workspace dependency in Cargo.toml
2. Add a 'completions' subcommand to the CLI that generates shell completion scripts for bash, zsh, fish, powershell, and elvish
3. The command should accept a --shell flag (with clap::ValueEnum) and output the completion script to stdout
4. Add the new command module in crates/loom-cli/src/commands/completions.rs
5. Wire it into the Cli enum in main.rs
6. Add basic tests verifying completion generation doesn't panic for each supported shell
7. Update the help text / README if relevant

The implementation is straightforward since Clap 4 has first-class completion support via clap_complete. No architectural concerns.
